texto: Again and again I will suffer
autor: again and again I will get back on my feet. I will not be defeated. I won't let my spirit be destroyed.

I won't let my spirit be destroyed. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Again and again I will suffer” articula reflexao, banana-yoshimoto, kitchen em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como kitchen.
